001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.key;
002
003import com.google.common.base.Preconditions;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.json.JsonSerializable;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
007
008/**
009 * Represents an object with a unique identifier.
010 */
011public abstract class Keyed implements JsonSerializable {
012    private final Key key;
013
014    /**
015     * Create a new key identified object.
016     *
017     * @param key Unique identifier
018     */
019    public Keyed(@NotNull Key key) {
020        Preconditions.checkNotNull(key, "Key cannot be null");
021        this.key = key;
022    }
023
024    /**
025     * Get the identifying key for this object.
026     *
027     * @return Unique identifier
028     */
029    @NotNull
030    public Key getKey() {
031        return this.key;
032    }
033
034    @Override
035    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
036        if (this == obj) {
037            return true;
038        }
039        if (obj == null) {
040            return false;
041        }
042        if (this.getClass() != obj.getClass()) {
043            return false;
044        }
045        Keyed other = (Keyed) obj;
046        return getKey().equals(other.getKey());
047    }
048
049    @Override
050    public int hashCode() {
051        return GSON.toJson(this).hashCode();
052    }
053
054    @Override
055    @NotNull
056    public String toString() {
057        return String.format("%s%s", getClass().getSimpleName(), GSON.toJson(this));
058    }
059}
